@graph.name: Land Rover models fitted with the BMW M47 (Td4)

mainEntity.name: How much does an M47 (Td4) engine replacement cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: A reconditioned M47 Td4 typically costs £1,500–£2,500 supply only, with used units from £500–£1,000. Fitting adds £700–£1,000 depending on labour rates and vehicle access.

mainEntity.name: Is the BMW M47 (Td4) a reliable engine?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes — the M47 is considered one of BMW's most reliable diesel fours (4.0★), with many examples exceeding 200,000 miles when properly maintained. Its simplicity and robust construction make it a favourite among Freelander owners.

mainEntity.name: What is the most common M47 failure?

acceptedAnswer.text: Swirl flap failure is the most critical — the plastic flaps in the intake manifold can break off and be ingested by the engine, causing catastrophic damage. Other common issues include EGR valve clogging, turbocharger wear, and injector problems.

mainEntity.name: Which Land Rover models use the M47?

acceptedAnswer.text: In Land Rover application, the M47 Td4 powered the Freelander 1 (L314) from 2000 to 2006. The engine was also used across BMW's 3 Series (E46), 5 Series (E39), X3 (E83), and other models.

mainEntity.name: Is the Land Rover M47 the same as BMW's version?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes — the M47D20 engine is mechanically identical across BMW and Land Rover fitments. Land Rover Freelander applications used slightly different ECU calibrations and ancillaries, but the core engine, block, and internals are the same.

rows.metric: One-line verdict: The M47 is a refined, economical diesel four — swirl flap failure is the main risk — buy with documented swirl flap history and regular oil changes.
* Best for: high-mileage drivers wanting BMW refinement and economy in a Freelander.
rows.value: * Avoid if: you're looking at an example with no swirl flap history or evidence of neglect.

compatibility.crossBrandNote: Also powers numerous BMW models including the 3 Series (E46), 5 Series (E39), and X3 (E83) → [BMW M47 page].

costGuide.labourEstimate: Fitting an M47 Td4 typically takes 8–10 hours at £65–£95/hr (independent) or £110–£160/hr (London/SE dealer) [INDUSTRY ESTIMATE].
costGuide.sharedCostNote: Parts cost is identical across BMW and Land Rover applications; labour time varies slightly by engine bay access and subframe design.
